preamble.title: ckb-to-cardano/groth16
preamble.description: Groth16 (BLS12-381) verifier + CKB-anchored binding lock in Aiken (the CKB->Cardano leg)

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

g16/seal_set/Insert.title: Insert
g16/seal_set/Insert.description: The seal-nullifier registry spend redeemer: the seal `key` (32B) to consume + its 128 merkle siblings.

g16/seal_set/SealSet.title: SealSet
g16/seal_set/SealSet.description: The seal-nullifier registry datum: the current SMT root over consumed seals.

leap_guard/GuardPolicy.title: GuardPolicy
leap_guard/GuardPolicy.description:
Operational policy (mirror of leap-guard-core::GuardPolicy): a per-leap cap + floor + pause/halt
 switch, read from an admin-controlled reference input. It can only FURTHER RESTRICT - conservation
 (`authorize_*`) is enforced separately and always. `max_amount == 0` means no cap.

leap_guard/PolicyState.title: PolicyState
leap_guard/PolicyState.description:
The threaded policy datum: the governor authorized to change it + the current policy. Lives here (the
 lib) so both `chiral_policy` (writer) and `cardano_bound`/`leap_mint_guard` (readers) share one shape -
 the previous split (chiral_policy wrote PolicyState, leap_mint_guard read bare GuardPolicy) was a latent
 CBOR mismatch.

leap_ratelimit/RateState.title: RateState
leap_ratelimit/RateState.description: The rolling accumulator datum on the singleton limiter cell.

leap_ratelimit/Tick.title: Tick
leap_ratelimit/Tick.description: Spend redeemer: the FT amount being minted this tx (pinned to the verified leap fact by leap_mint_guard).
